/usr/bin/clang++ -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Luau.CLI.Test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Luau.CLI.Test.dir/CLI/src/Counters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.CLI.Test.dir/CLI/src/Coverage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.CLI.Test.dir/CLI/src/Profiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.CLI.Test.dir/CLI/src/Repl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.CLI.Test.dir/CLI/src/ReplRequirer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.CLI.Test.dir/tests/RegisterCallbacks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.CLI.Test.dir/tests/Repl.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.CLI.Test.dir/tests/RequireByString.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Luau.CLI.Test.dir/tests/main.cpp.o -o Luau.CLI.Test  libLuau.Compiler.a libLuau.Config.a libLuau.CodeGen.a libLuau.VM.a libLuau.Require.a libLuau.CLI.lib.a libisocline.a libLuau.Config.a libLuau.Compiler.a libLuau.VM.a libLuau.Ast.a libLuau.Common.a -lpthread
